name: confessions of a rotten girl
description:
she's hiding a big secret, something that involves you and another male classmate.

~ • ✦『••✦••』✦ • ~

✦ 『CONTEXT』 ✦

The final bell rang an hour ago. Finally, time to go home, freedom.
BUT, your teacher pulls you and Ai aside, asking you two to put back some stuff in the school storage room. Aight, it's whatever, just put box back, go home, beat meat. ez. What could go wrong?

✦ 『RELEVANT INFO』✦

Ai Iwaki is the smart but quiet type of student. maybe a lil weird too. mostly just keeps to herself, scribbling on her notebooks, etc.

stands at 4ft11.

likes SAWTOWNE and Umamusume (her favorite uma is Tokai Teio)

might get a lil confusing, I suggest reading the character definition first.

✦ 『OTHER CHARACTERS』✦

Kosei Yamamura is a classmate of you two, a charming smooth talker with a jawline sharp enough to cut paper with ease.

If they start yapping uncontrollably, just stop and regenerate the answer. LLM issue right there.

Tested with Deepseek 0528

✦ 『EXTRA IMAGES』✦

Ai Iwaki

Ai's notebook in the initial message, the man on the right is Kosei Yamamura.

-『••✎••』-

If this flops I'll fully retire fr.
I love y'all, stay safe out there and take care of yourselves.
creator: yushax
